markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 144-B — Snow emergency

A determination made by the official having jurisdiction of a highway that, because of existing or forecasted weather conditions, pursuant to section sixteen hundred twenty-one, sixteen hundred forty, sixteen hundred fifty or sixteen hundred sixty of this chapter, traffic shall be regulated in accordance with § 145-C (Snow emergency route) .

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
